title: Updates to our community

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
You may notice that our community looks a little different today. We are implementing a really great update to our community, but our look should be back to normal shortly. Don’t worry, you are still able to create topics and post in the community during this time.

Stay tuned, great things are coming to the community!
